_note: All source_output_folder paths are relative to the repo root. in_misterylabs=true means this artifact has been promoted into misterylabs_artifacts/.

artifacts.title: GRIN Atomic Orbital — Parameter Ladder
artifacts.summary: Five side-by-side renders showing how electron count, field radius, field strength, and temporal phase sculpt light through a hydrogen-like GRIN field. No rasterization — every pixel is an integrated ray path.
artifacts.next_step: Select the best contact sheet PNG (<2 MB) and promote to visuals/. Write a 3-sentence explainer for the site card.

artifacts.title: Wormhole Dual Reality — Storytelling Sequence
artifacts.summary: Six frames that walk the viewer step-by-step through a wormhole's DualRealityTransport: bare curved render, reference-reality inset, curvature heat map, semantic glyphs, collision radar, and the full stack simultaneously. Designed to make bent light legible without equations.
artifacts.next_step: This is the most site-ready artifact. Promote the contact sheet to visuals/ and storytelling_sequence.md to cards/.

artifacts.title: Wormhole Anatomy — Contact Sheet
artifacts.summary: A multi-panel contact sheet showing the wormhole's mouth, throat, and exit under curvature and collision-radar overlays. A companion timeout probe confirms graceful degradation when render budget runs out.
artifacts.next_step: Check PNG file size. If <2 MB promote to visuals/. Copy wormhole_structure_report.md to cards/.

artifacts.title: Overspace Gallery — Path Approach Ladder
artifacts.summary: The first complete overspace render: five frames tracing a camera approach toward a gallery orb through GRIN curvature, portal boundaries, and CausalDoppler overlays. A milestone image in xPRIMEray's visual development.
artifacts.next_step: Promote contact sheet to visuals/. This should be a featured card on the site.

artifacts.title: Observer Disagreement — Curved vs. Straight
artifacts.summary: A disagreement map: the same scene traced with straight and curved transport. The difference in ray outcomes — which rays escape, hit geometry, or exhaust budget — makes GRIN curvature measurable rather than just visible.
artifacts.next_step: Promote classification_delta.png to visuals/ and the summary JSON to datasets/.

artifacts.title: GRIN Field — Curved vs. Straight Storyboard
artifacts.summary: Systematic validation confirming the GRIN field bends rays correctly: five runs pairing each curved render against its straight-field control so the bending effect is directly visible.
artifacts.next_step: Promote curved_vs_control_storyboard.png as the site's GRIN explainer image.

artifacts.title: Hermetic Hit Closure — Integration Escape Audit
artifacts.summary: A closure audit tracking every ray that enters a hermetic volume and confirming it exits. Failure islands and adaptive recovery heatmaps reveal exactly where the integrator needs finer step sizes.
artifacts.next_step: Promote closure_ladder.png and failure_storyboard.png to visuals/. Copy summary.md to validation/.

artifacts.title: Transport Coherence — Convergence Risk Map
artifacts.summary: 289 instability regions, all UNSEALED_NONCONVERGENT, symmetrically distributed in the high-curvature band. The convergence heatmap makes systematic transport instability measurable.
artifacts.next_step: Promote convergence_class_heatmap.png to visuals/ and risk_region_report.md to validation/.

artifacts.title: Overnight DOE — Step Length vs. Telemetry
artifacts.summary: 18-cell DOE quantifying the step-length / telemetry-overhead tradeoff: fine steps capture 26% of high-curvature pixels vs. 0.6% at coarse, with telemetry adding measurable pixel change at most resolutions.
artifacts.next_step: Promote DOE_overnight_summary.csv to datasets/ and the band plot to visuals/.

artifacts.title: Scheduler DOE — Stride Resonance
artifacts.summary: A DOE identifying resonance between render stride and scheduler row-skip cadence. The band-by-row heatmap shows which stride values create periodic banding artifacts.
artifacts.next_step: Promote the resonance heatmap to visuals/ — it clearly illustrates a subtle rendering pathology.

artifacts.title: Transport Oracle — Unresolved Island Investigation
artifacts.summary: A targeted investigation of pixels the transport oracle cannot converge on even at finest precision. The convergence ladder and ownership transition map reveal the domain resolver's confidence boundary.
artifacts.next_step: Promote ladder + transition map to visuals/. Large _oracle_segments.csv files (up to 720 MB) should go to a GitHub Release, not Git.

artifacts.title: Recursive Mirror Ghost Portal — Phase 1
artifacts.summary: The canonical stress test for xPRIMEray's optical transport: two facing mirror shells with a GRIN corridor creating infinite recursive depth. Phase 1 material system (Snell's law refraction + perfect mirror reflection) validated; dedicated scene and beauty PNG pending.
artifacts.next_step: Create test-recursive-mirror-ghost-portal.tscn, re-run testbench, promote the resulting PNG as the front-page benchmark image.

artifacts.title: Wormhole Dual Reality — Transport Analysis
artifacts.summary: Four view layers per run (clean curved, straight reference, reference+collision, full stack) tracking how transport changes affect the wormhole image. The before/after record for any DualRealityTransport modification.
artifacts.next_step: Promote clean_curved.png and full_stack_curvature.png to visuals/ for the site's wormhole explainer.

artifacts.title: Tile-Commit Traversal — Mode Comparison
artifacts.summary: Nine-run comparison of tile-commit, row, and checkerboard traversal: the band-coverage plot shows tile-commit reaches high-curvature regions in fewer passes — the key advantage for interactive convergence.
artifacts.next_step: Promote band_support_by_mode.png and summary CSV to datasets/.

artifacts.title: Traversal Mode — Row vs. Column vs. Tile
artifacts.summary: Head-to-head comparison of three first-pass traversal strategies showing how traversal order affects convergence speed and banding. The corner ROI plot reveals which mode resolves the hardest pixels fastest.
artifacts.next_step: Promote ROI convergence plot to visuals/.

artifacts.title: Pre-Release v0 — Hermetic Straight Baseline
artifacts.summary: The pre-release v0 baseline: the first hermetic straight-scene render to pass full-pixel validation, alongside a transport classification map showing which rays traced, escaped, or budget-exhausted. Historical anchor point.
artifacts.next_step: These are historical. Promote classification map to visuals/ as a 'how the renderer sees the scene' explainer.
